offer: For independent insurance brokers processing 5–15 policies/month, inefficient management causes missed renewal deadlines. We provide a streamlined policy management system instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient management of policy renewals leading to missed deadlines.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to independent brokers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try policy tracking dashboard with 1-3 entries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common policy details as templates
Set default reminder schedules for renewals
Allow CSV import for existing policies
Simplify onboarding steps for new users
